description: This Java class provides JWT token creation and validation services, including issuing access tokens based on user information and parsing/validating incoming tokens.

classes.name: JwtService
classes.description: Service class for creating and validating JWT tokens, utilizing application properties and cryptographic signing.

methods.name: JwtService
methods.description: Constructor initializing JWT service with properties and setting up the signing key.

methods.name: issueAccessToken
methods.description: Generates a signed JWT access token for a given user, embedding user ID, email, and roles.

methods.name: parseAndValidate
methods.description: Validates a provided JWT token and retrieves its claims after verification.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Extracts the user UUID from the JWT claims payload.
